description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and clean, geometric lines. The exterior is primarily white with accents of wood or tan paneling, and large windows are featured on both floors, allowing for ample natural light. The house is surrounded by several leafy green trees and has a wide, paved driveway and walkway leading to the main entrance. The landscaping is minimalistic, with open green spaces and a few shrubs near the entry. The front entryway is slightly recessed, with a small set of steps and a covered porch area. The overall design emphasizes simplicity, functionality, and integration with the surrounding environment.
description: A modern, two-story flat-roofed house with large windows, white and wood-accented exterior, and minimalistic landscaping with trees and paved walkways.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, wide driveway, and symmetrical arrangement of trees and walkways.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the large windows, wood accent panels, and the extension of the driveway to the side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying more windows, a simple back facade, and trees spaced around the property.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the back entrance, additional steps, and a clear view of the flat roof and landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main entry with a small set of steps, covered porch, and minimalistic landscaping
